title: bidens heterosperma
intro: Bidens heterosperma, also known as False Daisy, is a flowering plant species native to Australia, characterized by its yellow daisy-like flowers and medicinal properties. Traditionally, Bidens heterosperma has been used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant's extracts have been found to exhibit antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic activities, which contribute to its potential health benefits, such as reducing pain and inflammation, and promoting wound healing. Bidens heterosperma can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine and natural remedies.
